item.title: It's time for another unhinged XL Tuesday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
greetings online friends
is there a different option?
sertraline = zoloft
why
it really is something
practical
Homer demonstrated this in one of my favorite Simpsons episodes "The Cartridge Family"
mmm hmm
i don't think Anakin Skywalker will be joining
i knew they didn't actually exist
i was gonna guess bowling and cigarettes
delicious
well i'm convinced
my bug guy sent me this image and i was a bit flabbergasted
i feel this in my soul
i'm not going to tell you twice
stop doing this everyone
that's my set.. have a great night gang!!
item.dc:creator: CeleryMan7

item.title: Random dump of stolen memes to aid in serotonin release #74
item.description: mushroom mushroom
item.dc:creator: adultswim82

item.title: OC comic reposts- help me pay for my dogs vet bills
item.description:
In case anyone’s confused about why I was such an odd kid…. ✨ AUTISM ✨
I have been a long time imgurian comic artist who shares her stories. I posted the last two days about my dog needing help and so many of you rallied around us and generated funds and upvotes for exposure. He had to have two separate emergency surgeries totaling $12,000. We don’t even know if he will make it. The vets had us optimistic which is why we proceeded to save his life, but we got an update it’s about 50/50 now as he just got of his second surgery. we have about 10k of the 12k vet bills covered, we are almost to the full amount. If you have ever laughed, smiled or enjoyed my comics I beg of you to help upvote this for the fund awareness. Please and thank you from the bottom of my heart. —————- Original post details: We need help. On May 11th, at 11:30 pm, our beloved German Shepherd, Atreyu, had his stomach flip; Gastric Dilatation Volvulus (GDV). This is an emergency and life-threatening situation in which a dog with this condition has on average two hours to live. That night, while feeding my foster kitten, I checked on Atreyu, who had seemed slightly off the hour before. His abdomen had swelled up to three or four times the size it should be. I knew instantly his stomach had flipped and he was nearing death. Freddie was able to speed to the Veterinary ER Hospital and get there in just enough time for them to perform the first life-saving surgery. Unfortunately though he needed another surgery (yesterday) and it didn’t go the way they planned. He has about 50/50 chance of making it. We have a small amount in our savings but we are not able to afford the full amount. Any help from our friends and family or even fans of the comics, to help pay towards these two emergency surgeries would be desperately and greatly appreciated. I know we are not the only ones tight on money in this economy so please know, no matter what amount you can pay/or upvote this post, if you are able to help us we are forever thankful for anything you can do. http://spot.fund/vnr8hsc https://www.paypal.me/KristieLaneK

item.title: 5,500-Year-Old Sumerian Star Map.
item.description: For over 150 years scientists have tried to solve the mystery of a controversial cuneiform clay tablet that indicates the so-called Köfel’s impact event was observed in ancient times. The circular stone-cast tablet was recovered from the 650 BC underground library of King Ashurbanipal in Nineveh, Iraq in the late 19th century. Long thought to be an Assyrian tablet, computer analysis has matched it with the sky above Mesopotamia in 3300 BC and proves it to be of much more ancient Sumerian origin. The tablet is an “Astrolabe,” the earliest known astronomical instrument. It consists of a segmented, disk-shaped star chart with marked units of angle measure inscribed upon the rim.
item.dc:creator: Marco1959Collodi

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1216 (bronouns)
item.description:
Yeah, you heard me. I'm walking my fish. It's morning. Time to scream existentially at the sky and get this bread.
Just finished Fallout last night and hot damn, what a ride. Loved it.
What if I say it about thirty times and vary its declension?
I'll take either, honestly.
Especially silicate geologists.
Ouroboros can have some ouroboros, as a treat.
My Norse garb is 99 percent the dude on the right, but just with a different hat and different colors. I ORDERED MY SCYTHIAN CLOTHES I'm stupid excited.
I'd really enjoy this. She's guard captain, I'm in the front lines.
This is probably lore for the CK3 mod "After the End"
This Boi be gracklin' hard.
Hahahahahah, his is that ouroboros we talked about earlier.
This one is so good I'm reposting it as my first image for tomorrow.
Awww. Sad. Seems like the video didn't load.
Awwww. @QuidditchQueen713
Wait. Here we go?
Pippin tax. Today's message from Pippin: "Reeeeeerreewwe. Go Fuck you." (I accidentally hit a pinfeather when givng him scritches and now he is MAD.)
item.dc:creator: CodyBurkett

God can but I can’t
I’m trying to get my boyfriend to watch this with me
As if a chick is ever gonna see his dick especially as Adam. “Babe do you think it’d very rude to say his closet is made of glass?” “Who?” “He-Man” “He-man is in a poly relationship with 7 kids” “HUH?” “Oh that’s Captain Planet”
Yeah CRAIG you FUCK
@chriscaprisun
@chriscaprisun (again)
I KNOW YOU CAN I KNOW I CANT I DONT DAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAANCE

item.title: Sure i'm stronger and more independent, but....
item.description: Edit: editting since a lot of people are feeling this one.. this resonates with me a LOT... the other one that also hits me hard is something along the lines of: you become thenperson you needed when no one was around to help you. I dealt with the trauma of bullying (not to just name calling, but actively getting the shit beat out of me and having weapons pulled on me by wanna be gang bangers) starting in the 6th grade and learned that authority figures can't (or won't) do anything. So i had to learn to protect myself, and it lead to a lifetime of trust issues and refusing to accept help. I'm 42 now and still struggle with this daily, but recognizing the cause and the symptoms helps. Just gotta take one day at a time and try to correct those habits..
item.dc:creator: Tattooedpariah

item.title: WHOLESOME Wednesday dump of love and support : )
item.description:
1. (works on your pet too)
2. Good on bro, scoring points for humanity for when the whales take over
3. A captain always goes down with the ship
4. Who else has a cat like this
5. Ready to melt some hearts
6. Yap
7
8. Best reason to be a parent?
9
10
11. Kitty fell of a bike
12. Ohh gimme gimme gimme gimme
13. Little puppy trying to catch the wind
14. Father surprises daughter for her birthday : )
15. Thanks for scrolling all the way trough! Hope this dump made you happy! Finally I would like to share with you a little passion project of mine. Me and my brother are making a game that is inspired by "The Stanley Parable" and the narrator definitely has a touch a of GladOS to him. The game is part of Next Fest 2024 and it would the mean the world to us if you wishlisted: https://store.steampowered.com/app/2336120/Do_Not_Press_The_Button_To_Delete_The_Multiverse/
